items.html: Also, when the phase of light of Hod departs, Hod will be back-to-back with the upper light. Then Yesod will turn its anterior to Hod, Hod and Yesod will be face-to-face, and Malchut will be face-to-back, and the anterior of Malchut in the posterior of Yesod. This is so because the lust and the yearning of the Sefira to return its anterior to the light, but the near Sefira to the light still cannot return its anterior to it before it draws the measure of one Sefira far from the light.
